name: the small, dark fragments
identity: Mysterious, energy-emitting fragments discovered in the snow, radiating a sterile, alien aura. Their irregular shape and cold texture suggest an otherworldly origin, possibly linked to the anomalous mountain energy patterns.
current_status: Discovered and analyzed by the player during a survey of the frozen landscape, revealing their anomalous properties and connection to the mountain's energy.

appearance.value: small, dark, irregularly shaped, cool to the touch

properties.value: radiate sterile, alien energy; embedded in snow; associated with mountain anomalies

volatile_state.location: frozen landscape near camp and mountains
volatile_state.current_activity: being observed and analyzed by the player

notes: The fragments' origin and purpose remain unclear, suggesting potential ties to an ancient or extraterrestrial influence.
